---

### `> whoami`

<pre>
QA Engineer at Syde — Europe's biggest WordPress agency.
I break things professionally. Soon I'll build them too.
Currently: transitioning into WordPress Development.
Location: Novi Sad, Serbia
Status: DEVELOPER_FORM = 47% [=====>   ]
</pre>
